tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check --all packages/pipeline/src/index.ts packages/dashboard/pipeline.types.ts packages/dashboard/pipeline-dashboard.options.ts packages/dashboard/pipeline-run.repository.ts packages/dashboard/*.test.ts packages/dashboard/test/*.ts && deno check packages/dashboard/mod.ts && deno check --config packages/dashboard/public/deno.json packages/dashboard/public/pipeline-dashboard.ts
tasks.test:dashboard: deno test -A packages/dashboard/*.test.ts packages/dashboard/test/resource-lifecycle.test.ts packages/dashboard/test/docker-runner.test.ts && deno run -A packages/dashboard/test/docker.ts
